discrepancies.summary: R1 grants HIGH; R2 grants MEDIUM-HIGH. Both RATIFY_WITH_AMENDMENT. Divergence is non-substantive: R1 reads the substrate as fully self-contained and high-fidelity (HIGH); R2 reads the same substrate but applies the conditional-on-amendment-adoption framing more conservatively (MEDIUM-HIGH). Both reviewers cite identical substrate elements, agree on amendment text content, and flag no substrate gaps.
discrepancies.resolution: Most-conservative aggregation applied: operative band is MEDIUM-HIGH. Mirrors M7 V0 cascade (123 §3.2) protocol exactly; same outcome by design (rule preserves cross-cascade comparability with M4 V0 single-synth MEDIUM-HIGH precedent). Aggregation rule now well-tested at n=3 (M4 + M7 + M8a all aggregating to MEDIUM-HIGH).

discrepancies.summary: R1 omits the §6 signature block entirely (replaces it with a single meta-comment line: 'All §6 signature items (SHA verification Y, rubber-duck QA Y, qualifier acknowledgment Y) are supported by the template'). R2 reproduces the full §6 signature block verbatim with all 3 attestation lines (Substrate SHAs verified Y / Rubber-duck QA acknowledged Y / qualifier acknowledged Y). The dispatch packet §6 instructed the synth to fill out the 3-line attestation block; R1's compressed meta-comment is sub-protocol but content-equivalent (R1 affirms all 3 attestations).
discrepancies.resolution: R2 §6 adopted as canonical attestation source-of-record. R1 meta-comment recorded as supplementary HIGH-band corroboration. No re-prompt of R1 needed (content equivalence is clear). This is a cosmetic format divergence, not a substantive divergence; recurrence pattern below n=2 so no protocol amendment.

discrepancies.summary: R1 verdict-label line uses bold markdown ('**M8A_V0_VERDICT:** RATIFY_WITH_AMENDMENT'); R2 verdict-label line is plain text ('M8A_V0_VERDICT: RATIFY_WITH_AMENDMENT'). Both are parseable as the protocol-required label (regex would match either after bold-stripping). The dispatch-packet §3 instructed plain-text label format.
discrepancies.resolution: Parser tolerated both forms; verdict label parseable from R1 and R2 at STEP 0.3. No re-prompt needed. Forward-pointing: dispatch packet header could explicitly instruct synth to omit markdown formatting on the protocol-label line; defer until n=2 recurrence.
